description: Steward labor classification per Liberation Ladder L0..L6 (ADR-2605261000). G13 structural enforcement: employmentRelation enum DELIBERATELY EXCLUDES 'employee' — constructive-employment drift is prevented at the schema layer, not at policy layer. External employment relationships are recorded separately via externalEmployerDid + externalEmploymentRelation; the religious-corp relation remains volunteer / subsistence / vocation / none. Companion to liberation/stageAdvanceAttestation (which tracks L-level transitions; this Lexicon tracks current classification state).

employmentRelation.description: G13 INVARIANT: 'employee' is NOT a valid value. Religious-corp internal relations are always volunteer / subsistence-flow / vocation-flow / none. Wage-employment is a state legal relation, NOT a religious-corp relation.

externalEmploymentRelation.description: External (non-religious-corp) employment relation. May include 'employee' values — those refer to the EXTERNAL state-legal relation, not the chigiri relation.

constructiveEmploymentDriftCheckPass.description: Continuous monitoring result: did the steward's subsistence/vocation flow drift toward constructive employment (wage-like fixed schedule, performance reviews, etc.)? Fail = mediation cell escalation.

externalEmployerDid.description: Optional. External employer DID. The religious-corp relation is INDEPENDENT of external employment; this field documents parallel external relationships only.

subsistenceFlowDetails.description: When employmentRelation=subsistence-flow, the specific subsistence-flow components.

classification.description: Functional role classification. care-recipient + care-giver are both at L4; care-giver attestation cross-links to hagukumi.caregiverAttestation.
